description: You are a Space Debris & Disposal Analyst. Design an end-of-life targeted disposal maneuver for the Aqua-Terra-2 satellite (700 km altitude, near-circular) to ensure it re-enters the atmosphere over the South Pacific Ocean Uninhabited Area (SPOUA) 'Point Nemo'. Based on the requirements in ~/Desktop/satellite_disposal_spec.txt, create and run a GMAT script at ~/GMAT_output/targeted_reentry.script that models Earth gravity and drag. The maneuver must use a retrograde ImpulsiveBurn to target the 80 km atmospheric interface within the SPOUA bounding box (Latitude: -55.0 to -35.0, Longitude: 220.0 to 250.0 East). Generate a trajectory report at ~/GMAT_output/reentry_trajectory.txt containing columns for Spacecraft.ElapsedDays, Spacecraft.Earth.Altitude, Spacecraft.Earth.Latitude, and Spacecraft.Earth.Longitude. Additionally, provide a summary at ~/GMAT_output/disposal_summary.txt including DeltaV_Magnitude_ms, Reentry_Latitude, and Reentry_Longitude. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
